a0a324af5385.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
a0a324af5385.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
a0a324af5385.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

fcb0e3e1f539.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
fcb0e3e1f539.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

54f22847b61b.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
54f22847b61b.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
54f22847b61b.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

cef5dbf266a7.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
cef5dbf266a7.description: At 42 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
